headline: T. Rowe Price Launches Multi-Crypto ETF Including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP
summary: T. Rowe Price spent 89 years avoiding anything that looks like a gamble, then built a crypto fund where five managers hand-pick the coins instead of following any index. Their opening bets reveal a sharp disagreement with what the broader market currently says these assets are worth.

raw.headline: T. Rowe Price Launches Multi-Crypto ETF Including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP

headline: My $1.6 Million Retirement Account Has an Automatic Annuity Clause if I Die: What Are My Options?
summary: For anyone pursuing FIRE (financial independence, retire early), employer-sponsored retirement accounts are a cornerstone of the plan. But not every feature of these accounts is straightforward. Sometimes, buried language in plan documents creates confusion that can feel like a financial emergency, even when a closer look reveals there is no real problem. That is what happened to one Redditor posting in r/ChubbyFIRE who found what appeared to be a hidden annuity clause inside a T. Rowe Price emp

headline: Wall Street Deepens Crypto Push as T. Rowe Price Launches Multi-Token ETF and Citadel Invests $400M in Crypto.com
summary: T. Rowe Price launched TKNZ, the market’s first actively managed multi-token spot crypto product. Citadel Securities invested $400 million in Crypto.com at a $20 billion ...
